system.description:
The art of mingling in social settings to achieve your goals. Also covers gambling.
  • Gathering information in a bar or party: Carouse/INT 8+
  • Engaging in scintillating conversation to impress a diplomat: Carouse/SOC 8+
  • Drinking someone under the table: Carouse/END (Opposed)
  • Winning at cards: Gambling/SOC 8+
  • Singing or Dancing to impress or earn a living: Carouse/INT or Carouse/SOC 8+
system.shortdescr: Social mingling to achieve goals; also covers gambling.
